cookie_banner.title: We use cookies
cookie_banner.desc_part1: YumiScan uses essential technical cookies for its operation, as well as optional analytical and advertising cookies to measure audience and improve experience.
cookie_banner.necessary_desc: Essential for the application to function (authentication session). These cannot be disabled.
cookie_banner.analytics_desc: Audience measurement (Google Analytics, etc.) to analyze service usage and improve experience. No data is sold to third parties.
cookie_banner.ads_desc: Advertising tracking pixels (Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Google Ads) to measure the effectiveness of our campaigns. Activated only with your consent.

contact.title: Contact YumiScan - Food Scanner Support & Help
contact.description: Have a question about our allergen analysis app? Contact YumiScan support. We respond quickly.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: A question, feedback, or suggestion? Fill out the form below.

cta.title: Ready to secure your groceries?
cta.desc: YumiScan helps you eat with peace of mind by decoding Japanese labels for you.

maintenance.title: YumiScan is getting polished
maintenance.description: We are currently refining the app to make it smoother, clearer, and more reliable. Public access will be back shortly.
maintenance.reassurance: Thanks for your patience. Your next scan is already waiting. If you are part of the admin team, you can keep testing production during the maintenance window.
